text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp is over before we know it, and Mejiro Ryan remains inexperienced in... certain areas.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well... I had absolutely zero romantic encounters this summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I did great in the watermelon splitting contest,
and I helped carry the mikoshi shrine at the
summer festival, but that was about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hm, maybe it's for the best. With the Arima Kinen
coming up, training has to be my top priority.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This will be fine. When it comes to love, I'll need
more confidence than in racing before I'll find it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Someday, when my heart's stronger, I'll be able to
tell someone that I like them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's the kind of love I'm aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
choice_data_list: That giggle kind of ruined the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Geez, you don't gotta point that out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bus is leaving soon for Tracen Academy,
where Ryan's rivals await.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, did you hear the news?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They say this year's Arima Kinen will be Oguri's
last race in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There comes a time when everything must end,
even for a superstar racer like Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means the next time out will be Ryan's last
chance to race her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is gonna be all about Oguri now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She'll show up determined to win. If I can't beat
her there, then my dream's as good as gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A colossal trial now awaits her at the end. We'll
have to do something special to prepare for this
winter.
